  "findings": [
    "Rigging hook safety latch is missing or intentionally tied back, preventing secure closure of the hook throat."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the defective hook from service immediately.",
    "Replace the hook with one having a fully functional, self-closing safety latch, or install an approved manufacturer replacement latch kit before lifting operations begin."
  ],
  "rationale": "A hook with a missing or disabled safety latch is a critical safety hazard that violates OSHA and ASME standards. It allows rigging slings to accidentally slip out of the hook throat during slack or unbalanced loading, risking a dropped load.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.10",
    "OSHA 1926.251",
    "OSHA 1926.1431(g)(1)(i)(A)"
  ]
}
